mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})

(SELECT DISTINCT sub_no FROM nt_cfg_leaf WHERE grp_no IN ( SELECT nt_grp_no FROM com_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{authGrpNo}) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT sub_no FROM nt_cfg_grp_leaf WHERE grp_no IN ( SELECT nt_grp_no FROM com_auth_group_subgrp WHERE auth_grp_no = #{authGrpNo}))
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(grp_no), 1) + 1 FROM cm_topo_group WHERE user_id =
SELECT COUNT(uniq_id) FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id = AND uniq_id IS NOT NULL AND uniq_id = #{uniqId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.grp_no, grp_name, A.mng_no, CASE WHEN A.user_dev_name IS NULL OR A.user_dev_name = '' THEN A.dev_name ELSE A.user_dev_name END AS dev_name, A.dev_ip, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, (SELECT COALESCE(code_nm, '-') FROM tb_com_code WHERE p_code_id IN (SELECT code_id FROM tb_com_code WHERE code_cd = A.dev_kind1) AND code_cd = A.dev_kind2) AS dev_kind2_str, A.community, A.model, A.vendor, (SELECT code_value1 FROM cm_code10 WHERE code_kind = 'VENDOR' AND code_id = A.vendor) AS vendor_str, CASE WHEN B.mng_no IS NULL THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END AS is_exist FROM cm_dev10 A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM cm_topo_item WHERE dev_kind1 IN ('DEV','LMS') AND dev_kind2 NOT IN ('CCTV', 'ETC') AND user_id = ) B ON A.mng_no = B.mng_no INNER JOIN nt_cfg_group C ON A.grp_no = C.grp_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 IN ('DEV', 'LMS', 'RADIO') AND A.grp_no IN AND A.mng_no NOT IN ( SELECT mng_no FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id = AND dev_kind1 IN ('DEV','LMS') AND grp_no = #{grpNo} ) ) TB WHERE 1 = 1
AND TB.grp_name LIKE '%' || #{sGrpName} || '%'
AND TB.dev_ip LIKE '%' || #{sIp} || '%'
AND UPPER(TB.dev_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%'
AND TB.dev_kind2_str LIKE '%' || #{sDevKind2} || '%'
AND TB.vendor_str LIKE '%' || #{sVendor} || '%'
ORDER BY TB.grp_name, TB.dev_name, TB.dev_ip

update.foreach:
INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind ) VALUES ( , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{grpNo}, #{item.mngNo},
#{item.devKind1},
'DEV',
#{item.devKind2}, COALESCE( (SELECT img_file_nm FROM cm_topo_item_img WHERE dev_kind1 = 'DEV' AND dev_kind2 = #{item.devKind2} AND model = #{item.model}), #{item.devKind2}) )

INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, grp_no, item_no, item_type, item_sub_type, mng_no, xpoint, ypoint, item_size, sh_evt, item_sub_kind, item_file_name, item_alias, user_content, font_size, evt_level, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind, gc_no, uniq_id, evt_type, temp1, temp2, temp3, back_mng_no, show_label ) SELECT user_id, #{grpNo}, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), item_type, item_sub_type, mng_no, xpoint, ypoint, item_size, sh_evt, item_sub_kind, item_file_name, item_alias, user_content, font_size, evt_level, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind, gc_no, uniq_id, evt_type, temp1, temp2, temp3, back_mng_no, show_label FROM cm_topo_item WHERE item_no = #{item.itemNo} AND user_id =

mapper.select: SELECT item_no AS "itemNo", mng_no AS "mngNo", dev_kind1 AS "devKind1", dev_kind2 AS "devKind2" FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id = AND grp_no = #{grpNo} AND dev_kind1 != 'GRP'
SELECT grp_no AS "grpNo", link_no AS "linkNo", mng_no1 AS "mngNo1", mng_no2 AS "mngNo2" FROM cm_topo_link WHERE user_id = AND grp_no = #{grpNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.mng_no, CASE WHEN A.user_dev_name IS NULL OR A.user_dev_name = '' THEN A.dev_name ELSE A.user_dev_name END AS dev_name, A.dev_ip, '' AS ip_no, '' AS port, '' AS fr_port, grp_name, A.dev_kind1, A.dev_kind2, (SELECT COALESCE(code_nm, '-') FROM tb_com_code WHERE p_code_id IN (SELECT code_id FROM tb_com_code WHERE code_cd = A.dev_kind1) AND code_cd = A.dev_kind2) AS dev_kind2_str, CASE WHEN B.mng_no IS NULL THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END AS is_exist, CASE WHEN A.user_dev_name IS NULL OR A.user_dev_name = '' THEN A.dev_name ELSE A.user_dev_name END AS display_name, COALESCE(A.vendor, '-') AS vendor, (SELECT code_value1 FROM cm_code10 WHERE code_kind = 'VENDOR' AND code_id = A.vendor) AS vendor_str, COALESCE(A.model, '-') AS model FROM cm_dev10 A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM cm_topo_item WHERE dev_kind1 IN ('SVR', 'VSVR') AND user_id = ) B ON A.mng_no = B.mng_no INNER JOIN nt_cfg_group C ON A.grp_no = C.grp_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 IN ('SVR', 'VSVR') AND A.mng_no NOT IN ( SELECT mng_no FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id = AND dev_kind1 IN ('SVR', 'VSVR') AND grp_no = #{grpNo} ) ) TB WHERE 1 = 1
AND TB.grp_name LIKE '%' || #{sGrpName} || '%'
AND TB.dev_ip LIKE '%' || #{sIp} || '%'
AND UPPER(TB.dev_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%'
AND TB.dev_kind2_str LIKE '%' || #{sDevKind2} || '%'
AND TB.vendor_str LIKE '%' || #{sVendor} || '%'
ORDER BY TB.grp_name, TB.dev_name, TB.dev_ip

update.foreach: INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind ) VALUES ( , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{grpNo}, #{item.mngNo}, #{item.devKind1}, #{item.devKind2}, COALESCE(#{item.devKind2}, 'SERVER') )

mapper.select:
SELECT A.sub_no, A.sub_name, A.ip, A.sub_mask_no, C.grp_name, CASE WHEN B.mng_no IS NULL THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END AS is_exist FROM nt_cfg_subnet A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM cm_topo_item WHERE dev_kind1 = 'SUB' AND user_id = ) B ON A.sub_no = B.mng_no INNER JOIN nt_cfg_group C ON A.grp_no = C.grp_no WHERE grp_type = 1 AND A.grp_no IN AND A.sub_no NOT IN ( SELECT mng_no FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id = AND dev_kind1 = 'SUB' AND grp_no = #{grpNo} )
AND C.grp_name LIKE '%' || #{sGrpName} || '%'
AND A.ip LIKE '%' || #{sIp} || '%'
AND UPPER(A.sub_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%'
ORDER BY grp_name, sub_name, ip

update.foreach: INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind ) VALUES ( , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{grpNo}, #{item.subNo}, 'SUB', 'SUBNET', 'SUBNET_A1' )

mapper.update:
INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind, evt_level ) VALUES ( , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{grpNo}, 0, 'ETC', #{etcKind}, #{etcKind} || '_A1', 0 );
INSERT INTO cm_topo_etc ( user_id, item_no, dev_name, dev_ip, icmp_polling, url ) VALUES ( , (SELECT MAX(item_no) FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{etcName}, #{devIp}, 'N', #{url} )
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT A.grp_no, grp_name, rack_no, rack_name, rack_u, rack_type, vendor, model, TO_CHAR(CAST(yyyymmdd AS DATE), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ymd, width, height, CASE WHEN B.mng_no IS NULL THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END AS isexist FROM s_cm_rack A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM cm_topo_item WHERE dev_kind1 = 'RACK' AND user_id = ) B ON A.rack_no = B.mng_no INNER JOIN nt_cfg_group C ON A.grp_no = C.grp_no WHERE 1 = 1
AND C.grp_name LIKE '%' || #{sGrpName} || '%'
AND UPPER(A.rack_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%'
AND A.rack_no NOT IN ( SELECT mng_no FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id = AND dev_kind1 = 'RACK' AND grp_no = #{grpNo} ) ORDER BY rack_name

update.foreach: INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind ) VALUES ( , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{grpNo}, #{item.rackNo}, 'RACK', 'RACK', 'RACK_A1' )

mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT D.grp_name, A.parent_mng_no, CASE WHEN APC.user_dev_name IS NULL OR APC.user_dev_name = '' THEN APC.dev_name ELSE APC.user_dev_name END AS dev_name, A.mng_no, CASE WHEN A.user_dev_name IS NULL OR A.user_dev_name = '' THEN A.dev_name ELSE A.user_dev_name END AS ap_name, B.ap_mac, B.ap_ip, CASE WHEN C.mng_no IS NULL THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END AS isexist FROM cm_dev10 A INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM cm_dev10 WHERE dev_kind1 = 'DEV' AND dev_kind2 IN ('AP_CONTROLLER', 'AP_ALONE')) APC ON A.parent_mng_no = APC.mng_no INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM cm_dev_ap WHERE mng_no IN (SELECT mng_no FROM cm_dev_ap_sub)) B ON A.mng_no = B.mng_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM cm_topo_item WHERE dev_kind1 = 'APC' AND dev_kind2 = 'AP' AND user_id = ) C ON A.mng_no = C.mng_no INNER JOIN nt_cfg_group D ON A.grp_no = D.grp_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'APC' AND A.dev_kind2 = 'AP' AND A.grp_no IN AND A.mng_no NOT IN ( SELECT mng_no FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id = AND dev_kind1 = 'APC' AND dev_kind2 = 'AP' AND grp_no = #{grpNo} )
AND D.grp_name LIKE '%' || #{sGrpName} || '%'
AND UPPER(CASE WHEN APC.user_dev_name IS NULL OR APC.user_dev_name = '' THEN APC.dev_name ELSE APC.user_dev_name END) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%'
AND B.ap_ip LIKE '%' || #{sApIp} || '%'
AND B.ap_mac LIKE '%' || #{sApMac} || '%'
AND UPPER(CASE WHEN A.user_dev_name IS NULL OR A.user_dev_name = '' THEN A.dev_name ELSE A.user_dev_name END) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sApName}) || '%'
ORDER BY grp_name, dev_name, ap_name

update.foreach: INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind ) VALUES ( , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{grpNo}, #{item.mngNo}, 'APC', 'AP', 'AP_A1' )

mapper.select:
SELECT CASE WHEN B.mng_no IS NULL THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END AS isexist, C.grp_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(RTU.user_dev_name, ''), RTU.dev_name) AS parent_name, RTU.dev_ip AS parent_ip, COALESCE(NULLIF(A.user_dev_name, ''), A.dev_name) AS dev_name, A.mng_no, A.dev_ip, A.vendor, A.sensor_model, A.mng_no AS fms_seq_no, COALESCE(NULLIF(A.usr_name, ''), A.sensor_name) AS sensor_name, A.sensor_kind, A.sensor_index, COALESCE(E.code_value1, '정상') AS status FROM ( SELECT X.mng_no, X.grp_no, X.parent_mng_no, X.user_dev_name, X.dev_name, X.dev_ip, Y.sensor_name, Y.usr_name, X.vendor, X.model AS sensor_model, Y.sensor_index, Y.sensor_kind FROM cm_dev10 X INNER JOIN tb_fms_sensor Y ON X.mng_no = Y.mng_no WHERE X.dev_kind1 = 'RTU' AND X.dev_kind2 = 'SENSOR' ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN cm_dev10 RTU ON RTU.mng_no = A.parent_mng_no LEFT JOIN cm_topo_item B ON (A.mng_no = B.mng_no AND B.dev_kind1 = 'SENSOR') LEFT JOIN cm_evt D ON (A.mng_no = D.src_mng_no AND D.status = 'C') LEFT JOIN cm_code10 E ON ( D.evt_level = E.code_value3 AND E.code_kind = 'WEB_CONF' AND E.code_id LIKE '%EVT_LEVEL%' ) INNER JOIN nt_cfg_group C ON A.grp_no = C.grp_no WHERE C.grp_no IN
AND C.grp_name LIKE '%' || #{sGrpName} || '%'
AND UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(A.user_dev_name, ''), A.dev_name)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%'
AND A.dev_ip LIKE '%' || #{sIp} || '%'
ORDER BY grp_name, A.sensor_index, dev_name

update.foreach: INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind, temp1 ) VALUES ( , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id = ), #{grpNo}, #{item.mngNo}, 'SENSOR', #{item.sensorKind}, #{item.sensorKind}, #{item.fmsSeqNo} )

mapper.select:
SELECT A.mng_no, B.was_no, A.dev_name, B.was_nm, A.dev_ip, B.conn_port, grp_name, B.was_kind, CASE WHEN B.mng_no IS NULL THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END AS is_exist, CASE WHEN A.user_dev_name IS NULL OR A.user_dev_name = '' THEN A.dev_name ELSE A.user_dev_name END AS display_name, A.vendor, A.model FROM cm_dev10 A INNER JOIN nt_svr_was B ON A.mng_no = B.mng_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM cm_topo_item WHERE dev_kind1 = 'WAS' AND user_id = ) C ON B.was_no = C.mng_no INNER JOIN nt_cfg_group D ON A.grp_no = D.grp_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'SVR' AND A.grp_no IN AND B.was_no NOT IN ( SELECT mng_no FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id = AND dev_kind1 = 'WAS' AND grp_no = #{grpNo} )
AND D.grp_name LIKE '%' || #{sGrpName} || '%'
AND UPPER(CASE WHEN A.user_dev_name IS NULL OR A.user_dev_name = '' THEN A.dev_name ELSE A.user_dev_name END) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%'
AND A.dev_ip LIKE '%' || #{sIp} || '%'
AND B.was_nm LIKE '%' || #{sWasName} || '%'

update.foreach: INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind ) VALUES ( , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{grpNo}, #{item.wasNo}, 'WAS', COALESCE(#{item.wasKind}, 'WAS'), #{item.wasKind} )

mapper.select:
SELECT A.mng_no, B.dbms_no, A.dev_name, B.dbms_nm, A.dev_ip, B.dbms_port, grp_name, B.dbms_kind, CASE WHEN B.mng_no IS NULL THEN 'No' ELSE 'Yes' END AS is_exist, CASE WHEN A.user_dev_name IS NULL OR A.user_dev_name = '' THEN A.dev_name ELSE A.user_dev_name END AS display_name, A.vendor, A.model FROM cm_dev10 A INNER JOIN nt_svr_dbms B ON A.mng_no = B.mng_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM cm_topo_item WHERE dev_kind1 = 'DBMS' AND user_id = ) C ON B.dbms_no = C.mng_no INNER JOIN nt_cfg_group D ON A.grp_no = D.grp_no WHERE A.dev_kind1 = 'SVR' AND A.grp_no IN AND B.dbms_no NOT IN ( SELECT mng_no FROM cm_topo_item WHERE user_id = AND dev_kind1 = 'DBMS' AND grp_no = #{grpNo} )
AND D.grp_name LIKE '%' || #{sGrpName} || '%'
AND UPPER(CASE WHEN A.user_dev_name IS NULL OR A.user_dev_name = '' THEN A.dev_name ELSE A.user_dev_name END) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{sDevName}) || '%'
AND A.dev_ip LIKE '%' || #{sIp} || '%'
AND B.dbms_nm LIKE '%' || #{sDbmsName} || '%'

update.foreach: INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, dev_kind1, dev_kind2, usr_kind ) VALUES ( , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{grpNo}, #{item.dbmsNo}, 'DBMS', COALESCE(#{item.dbmsKind}, 'DBMS'), #{item.dbmsKind} )

INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, xpoint, ypoint, dev_kind1, dev_kind2 ) VALUES ( , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{grpNo}, #{item.mngNo}, #{item.xPoint}, #{item.yPoint},
#{item.devKind1},
'DEV',
#{item.devKind2} )

INSERT INTO cm_topo_item ( user_id, item_no, grp_no, mng_no, xpoint, ypoint, dev_kind1, dev_kind2 ) VALUES ( , (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_no), 0) + 1 FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{grpNo}, 0, #{item.xPoint}, #{item.yPoint}, 'ETC', #{item.devKind2} );
INSERT INTO cm_topo_etc ( user_id, item_no, dev_name, dev_ip, icmp_polling ) VALUES ( , (SELECT MAX(item_no) FROM cm_topo_item A WHERE user_id = ), #{item.devName}, #{item.devIp}, 'N' )
